horoscope.title: Daily horoscope
horoscope.description: Western daily reading for any zodiac sign.

natal_chart.title: Natal chart
natal_chart.description: Western birth chart with planets, houses, and aspects.
natal_chart.missing_message: The birth_date, birth_time, lat, and lon attributes are required (tz defaults to UTC; pass an IANA name or decimal hours for accuracy). Example: %s

tarot_card.title: Tarot card
tarot_card.description: Single card, three card, or Celtic Cross spreads.
tarot_card.example: [roxy_tarot_card spread="three" question="What should I focus on this week"]

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.description: Life path, expression, and soul urge from a name and date.
numerology.missing_message: The name and birth_date attributes are required. Example: %s
numerology.transform_error_message: The birth_date attribute must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Example: %s

life_path.title: Life path
life_path.description: Life path number and core meaning from a birth date.
life_path.missing_message: The birth_date attribute is required. Example: %s
life_path.transform_error_message: The birth_date attribute must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Example: %s

iching.title: I Ching
iching.description: Hexagram cast and interpretation for any question.
iching.example: [roxy_iching question="Should I take the new job"]

dream.title: Dream symbol
dream.description: Dictionary of three thousand dream symbols.
dream.missing_message: Either the symbol or id attribute is required. Example: %s

biorhythm.title: Biorhythm
biorhythm.description: Physical, emotional, and intellectual cycle values.
biorhythm.missing_message: The birth_date attribute is required. Example: %s

angel_number.title: Angel number
angel_number.description: Meaning and pattern analysis for any number sequence.
angel_number.missing_message: The number attribute is required. Example: %s

crystal.title: Crystal
crystal.description: Properties, zodiac pairings, and chakra alignments.
crystal.missing_message: The name attribute is required. Example: %s
